summary: None of the retrieved evidence establishes a link between tumor-specific features and fear of recurrence in head and neck cancer survivors. Psychological symptoms like anxiety are mentioned peripherally, but no predictive model or biomarker connects clinical factors to this specific psychosocial outcome.
